metadata.description: Personally curated Claude Code skills, fed from vetted upstream repos. Focus: security, secdevops, devops, kubernetes, AWS, terraform, backend, frontend, fullstack.

plugins.name: backend-core
plugins.description: Backend framework specialists: FastAPI, NestJS, Go.

plugins.name: devops-core
plugins.description: DevOps & SRE skills: monitoring, incident runbooks, GitHub Actions, deployment pipelines, cost optimization.

plugins.name: infra-core
plugins.description: Infrastructure-as-code skills: Terraform, CloudFormation, Kubernetes, multi-cloud architecture.

plugins.name: secdevops-core
plugins.description: SecDevOps skills: threat modeling (STRIDE, attack trees), SAST, k8s security policies, GitOps, secrets management.

plugins.name: security-core
plugins.description: Curated security & auditor skills: code review, secure coding, API security testing, production audits.
